title: Brachypappus candicans
taxonomy: Brachypappus candicans is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Brachypappus candicans is a member of the tribe Astereae. This plant is also known as silver beard grass. Its classification includes being a dicotyledonous perennial grass.
